nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=78 beats='second person; you are a child of the opera house crew who has slipped below the stage into the glass labyrinth to reach the old prompter's records that clear your family's name; the way out is one long spine of mirror rooms, each a killing test; state the grave stakes plainly, many go down and few come up, and a wrong step ends here'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=66 beats='second person; the door seals cold behind you and the way is one long spine of mirror rooms falling deeper under the stage; there is no going back and no second try inside, only forward from room to room, and each room is a test that has kept better climbers than you; keep your nerve and your eyes'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='second person; you come to the Hall of False Doors; you enter a round hall of a hundred bright doorways, all of them mirrors; the cold air smells of dust and old velvet from the theatre above'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='second person; every doorway throws your reflection back at you except one; the true door is the black gap that holds no reflection; the rule is plain, walk into any mirror and the glass takes your face; choose the door that does not answer you'>>

choices.label: Step through the doorway that shows no reflection.
Shoulder through the nearest bright door.
Wait for the true door to reveal itself.
Feel along the frames for a hidden latch.
Follow your own reflection deeper in.
Gamble on the door you first came in by.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the false doors fall dark behind you and a narrow passage of cold glass opens; you are past the first hall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you strike the lit glass at a run and it does not give'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the mirror splits along your reflection and the shards come inward before you can turn'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the mirror splits along your reflection and the shards come inward before you can turn'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you stand still and watch the hundred reflections instead of moving'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the delay is the death here; the ushers who keep this hall close on your held silhouette in the glass'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death here; the ushers who keep this hall close on your held silhouette in the glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you run your palm across the silvered seams looking for iron'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; a frame swings and the edge opens your hand to the wrist, and the cold does the rest'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; a frame swings and the edge opens your hand to the wrist, and the cold does the rest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you trust the figure that walks where you walk and go after it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; it leads you between two mirrors that were never a door and the hall folds shut'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it leads you between two mirrors that were never a door and the hall folds shut'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=62 beats='second person; you turn back toward the doorway you entered by; it may still be open, or the hall may have sealed it in silvered glass behind you; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you press into where you came from and meet cold glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; your own eyes stare back an instant before the hall keeps you'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; your own eyes stare back an instant before the hall keeps you'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; hands in usher's gloves take your arms from the dark and walk you up into a locked box above; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='second person; you come to the Silvered Stair; a staircase drops away, reflected on both walls into a falling infinity of steps; a single candle burns at the bottom'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='second person; the candlelight catches every solid step and slides off the false ones; a step that shines back at you is glass and will drop you the whole depth of the stair; tread only the steps the candle does not light'>>

choices.label: Tread the dull steps the candle does not catch.
Take the bright steps, they look nearest.
Slide down the banister to save time.
Hold at the top until your eyes adjust.
Jump the flight to the lit candle below.
Gamble and pinch the candle out to read the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you go down step by dull step and reach the burning candle at the foot; the stair is behind you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you set your weight on a step that shines back at you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the glass gives like water and the reflected stair swallows you down its false depth'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the glass gives like water and the reflected stair swallows you down its false depth'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you throw a leg over the rail and let the smooth glass carry you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the banister ends in mirror halfway down and there is nothing under your hands but the drop'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the banister ends in mirror halfway down and there is nothing under your hands but the drop'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you freeze on the landing and wait for the false steps to sort themselves out'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; waiting is the killing here; the candle gutters, the solid steps go dark with the false, and the stair takes the guess you finally make'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; waiting is the killing here; the candle gutters, the solid steps go dark with the false, and the stair takes the guess you finally make'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you leap for the light at the bottom in one drop'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the candle stood on glass; you and the flame go through it together'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the candle stood on glass; you and the flame go through it together'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='second person; you crush the flame; in the sudden black the solid steps might glow faintly of themselves, or the whole stair might vanish under you; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you take a step you cannot see'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the reflected stair opens and there is no landing'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the reflected stair opens and there is no landing'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a warden's lantern finds you frozen on the last true step and its owner does not mean to let you leave; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='second person; you come to the Whispering Gallery; a long mirrored gallery curves away; far above, an orchestra tunes for the evening and the sound leaks down through the stone'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='second person; the glass here is strung so tight that any near sound cracks it; you may only move under the loud swells of the orchestra above, never in the quiet between them; step in a silence and the walls shatter on you'>>

choices.label: Move only under the orchestra's loud swells.
Cross in the quiet to hear yourself think.
Call out to test for an echo.
Wait for the music to stop, then run.
Drag your hand along the wall to steady yourself.
Hum along to match the swell.
Gamble and sprint the whole gallery at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you time your steps to the music and cross under cover of a long chord; the gallery holds'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you choose a still moment and walk it in silence'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; your own footfall is the loudest thing in the hush and the strung glass answers it all at once'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your own footfall is the loudest thing in the hush and the strung glass answers it all at once'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you raise your voice to map the gallery ahead'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the word returns as a hundred cracks and the ceiling of mirror lets go'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the word returns as a hundred cracks and the ceiling of mirror lets go'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you crouch and hold until the players rest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the wait is the trap; in the rest between pieces there is no cover left, and the first step you take rings the whole gallery down'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wait is the trap; in the rest between pieces there is no cover left, and the first step you take rings the whole gallery down'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you keep a palm on the cold glass as you go'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the friction sings up the pane and the note it finds is the one that breaks'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the friction sings up the pane and the note it finds is the one that breaks'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you pitch your own voice into the music to stay hidden'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you land a half-tone off and the discord splits the gallery from end to end'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; you land a half-tone off and the discord splits the gallery from end to end'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=58 beats='second person; you break into a dead run for the far arch; you may cross before the glass can gather the sound, or you may not; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the glass gathers the sound of them'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the gallery comes down a stride from the arch'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the gallery comes down a stride from the arch'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a stagehand hauls you through a side door as the glass falls, and the door locks from his side; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='second person; you come to the Chandelier Vault; the passage opens under a vast chandelier of glass drops, hung on one frayed chain over a floor of mirror'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='second person; the chandelier swings a slow arc; cross only when it hangs dead still at the top of its swing, never while it moves; step under it swinging and it comes down through you and the floor both'>>

choices.label: Cross while the chandelier hangs dead still.
Dash under it while it's still climbing.
Cut the chain to drop it out of the way.
Hold at the edge until it stops on its own.
Climb the chain above the swing.
Gamble on the mirror floor holding your run.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you wait out the swing, then walk the floor beneath the stopped weight and reach the far door'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you break for the far side as the great weight rises'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the arc reverses at the top and the chandelier finds the floor, and you, on the way down'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the arc reverses at the top and the chandelier finds the floor, and you, on the way down'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you swing at the frayed chain to be rid of the thing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; it drops early and wide and the glass storm of it fills the vault'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it drops early and wide and the glass storm of it fills the vault'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you wait for the swing to die of itself before moving'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; waiting kills you here; the draft from the passage keeps it swinging, and the longer you crouch the more the guards behind you gain'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; waiting kills you here; the draft from the passage keeps it swinging, and the longer you crouch the more the guards behind you gain'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you take to the chain to pass over the top'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the frayed link parts under your weight and takes you into the drops below'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the frayed link parts under your weight and takes you into the drops below'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=62 beats='second person; you decide the floor is solid enough and start across without minding the swing; the mirror underfoot may be stone-backed, or only glass over the drop; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; it stars white under your second step'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go through it under the swinging weight'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; you go through it under the swinging weight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a rope drops from the dark above and a rigger's hands haul you up out of the vault and do not set you free; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=52 beats='second person; you come to the Cold Mirror; a single tall mirror blocks the passage, rimed white with frost, the only way a door somewhere in its face'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='second person; breathe on the frost and your breath clears the true seam of the door; but the cold of this glass is deep, and every breath you spend leaning close leaks the warmth out of you; find the seam in one breath and go, linger and the cold stops your heart'>>

choices.label: Fog it once, read the seam, and step through fast.
Warm the whole glass with both hands.
Breathe on it slow to be sure of the seam.
Strike the frozen glass to break through.
Wipe the frost clear with your sleeve.
Gamble and step through where you guess the seam is.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; your breath clears the door's outline; you find the seam and push through before the cold can hold you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you press your palms flat to melt a wider view'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the cold climbs your arms faster than the frost clears and it does not let go'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the cold climbs your arms faster than the frost clears and it does not let go'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you lean close and fog it again and again to read it perfectly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the waiting is the wound; each careful breath spends more of your warmth than the last, and the cold takes you leaning on the glass'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the wound; each careful breath spends more of your warmth than the last, and the cold takes you leaning on the glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you drive your elbow into the rimed pane'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the frost-brittle mirror bursts and the cold rushes the whole gap into you'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the frost-brittle mirror bursts and the cold rushes the whole gap into you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you scrub at the ice to see the door plain'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the frost peels and the bare cold glass drinks the heat straight out of your hand and up'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the frost peels and the bare cold glass drinks the heat straight out of your hand and up'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='second person; you do not fog it at all; you press where you think the door must be and trust the guess; the frost hides a seam or a solid pane; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the solid glass holds and the cold holds you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you freeze against the mirror with your hand still raised'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; you freeze against the mirror with your hand still raised'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a keeper wrapped against the cold lifts you off the frost half-frozen and carries you somewhere with a lock; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='second person; you come to the Gallery of Twin Wardens; two figures stand in the passage ahead, identical, one of glass and one of flesh, and only one will let you pass'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='second person; a real body casts a shadow on the floor and a reflection does not; the flesh warden guards the false path and the glass one stands before the true door; pass the figure that throws no shadow, and never the one that does'>>

choices.label: Pass the warden that casts no shadow.
Pass the one with a shadow at its feet.
Strike the glass one to be certain.
Wait to see which of them breathes.
Walk the line straight between them.
Gamble and offer your hand to the nearer figure.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you walk past the shadowless figure and it does not move; the true door stands open behind it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you step by the figure the light lies across'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the flesh warden closes a hand on you and the glass door was never his to open'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the flesh warden closes a hand on you and the glass door was never his to open'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you swing to shatter the figure you take for a mirror'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; your fist meets flesh, not glass, and he was faster than you guessed'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your fist meets flesh, not glass, and he was faster than you guessed'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you hold and watch the two figures for the rise of a chest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the delay is fatal; neither breathes for you, and the flesh one tires of the game and takes you where you stand'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is fatal; neither breathes for you, and the flesh one tires of the game and takes you where you stand'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you try to thread the gap without choosing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; both close on you at once, glass on one side and hands on the other, and the gap was never a path'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; both close on you at once, glass on one side and hands on the other, and the gap was never a path'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=58 beats='second person; you reach out to the figure on your right; a cold palm is glass and safe, a warm one is the warden and is not; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the warden has you before you can pull back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; he does not let a caught hand go'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; he does not let a caught hand go'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; the flesh warden marches you off down a corridor of mirrors to a door that only opens the one way; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='second person; you come to the Drowned Orchestra Pit; the floor falls into a flooded pit, black water doubling the mirrored walls so pit and reflection meet at a seam'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='second person; the water is deep and the reflected floor beneath it is a lie; only the narrow stone rim around the edge bears weight; walk the rim, never the bright false floor on the water'>>

choices.label: Edge along the narrow stone rim.
Cross the bright floor in the middle.
Swim straight across, it's only water.
Wait on the rim for the water to still.
Reach for the reflected rail to steady yourself.
Gamble and leap the pit at its narrow throat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you press your back to the glass and side-step the rim all the way around; the pit is behind you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you step out onto the shining floor the water shows'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; there is no floor, only the double of one, and the black water closes over your head'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; there is no floor, only the double of one, and the black water closes over your head'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you lower yourself in to swim the shorter line'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the cold pit has no far wall you can climb, only sheer glass, and it keeps what falls in'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the cold pit has no far wall you can climb, only sheer glass, and it keeps what falls in'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you crouch on the stone and wait for the surface to settle'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the wait drowns you slow; the water is rising from somewhere, and it takes the rim out from under you inch by inch'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wait drowns you slow; the water is rising from somewhere, and it takes the rim out from under you inch by inch'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you grab the handrail the mirror shows over the water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; your hand closes on nothing and the reach pitches you off the true rim'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your hand closes on nothing and the reach pitches you off the true rim'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=62 beats='second person; you back up and run for the narrowest span of black water; you may clear it, or you may come down short in the dark; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the water takes your legs and then the rest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the pit does not give back what it catches'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the pit does not give back what it catches'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a boatman poles out of the dark, hauls you dripping from the pit, and rows you to a cell above the waterline; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='second person; you come to the Candle Maze; a low maze of glass walls runs ahead, some turns lit by candles set in the mirrors, some dark'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='second person; the candles here mark the mirror dead-ends, set to draw you into the glass; the true way is always the unlit turn; follow the dark corridors, never the lit ones'>>

choices.label: Take the unlit turns through the maze.
Follow the lighted turns, they seem the way.
Pinch out a candle to darken a false turn.
Stop and wait for a candle to burn out.
Knock a wall to hear which are hollow.
Gamble and follow the draft instead of the light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you keep to the dark corners against every pull of the candlelight and come out the far side of the maze'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go toward the warm candlelight at the next corner'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the lit turn ends in a mirror and you are already at a run when you meet it'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the lit turn ends in a mirror and you are already at a run when you meet it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you snuff a flame to make a dead-end look like a way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the melted wax scalds your hand and you reel into the very glass you meant to hide'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the melted wax scalds your hand and you reel into the very glass you meant to hide'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you sit at a junction and wait for the lights to die on their own'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; waiting is the killing; the candles are trimmed by unseen hands and never burn down, and the ones that keep the maze find you sitting'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; waiting is the killing; the candles are trimmed by unseen hands and never burn down, and the ones that keep the maze find you sitting'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you rap the panes for the ring of an open way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; one pane you strike is under tension and it bursts across you at the sound'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; one pane you strike is under tension and it bursts across you at the sound'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='second person; you wet a finger and follow the faint cold draft, hoping the true way breathes air; the moving air may lead out or into a vent of glass; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you are boxed in mirror with the air whistling past'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the maze closes the way you came'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the maze closes the way you came'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a linkboy with a shielded lamp finds you in the dark and leads you not out but up, to a barred room; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='second person; you come to the Prompter's Box; a trapdoor sits in the floor beneath the stage, a prompter's box half sunk in mirror, its lid keyed to the music above'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='second person; the trap opens clean only on the downbeat of the music overhead; force it on a rest and the mechanism scissors shut; drop through on the beat, never in the silence between'>>

choices.label: Drop through on the downbeat of the music.
Pry the lid up during a quiet rest.
Wait for a longer, safer gap in the music.
Wedge the lid so it can't close on you.
Drop through on the last note, not the first.
Gamble and roll through without counting at all.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you count the bars, take the beat, and drop clean into the passage below the box'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you lever the trap in the hush between phrases'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the box takes the silence as its cue to close and the lid comes down like shears'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the box takes the silence as its cue to close and the lid comes down like shears'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you hold for a pause wide enough to be sure of'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the delay is the death; the piece ends and the players go still, and with no beat left the trap seals for the night with you on the wrong side'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death; the piece ends and the players go still, and with no beat left the trap seals for the night with you on the wrong side'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you jam a splinter of mirror into the hinge'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the glass wedge snaps and the freed lid falls twice as fast'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the glass wedge snaps and the freed lid falls twice as fast'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you take the end of the phrase instead of its downbeat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you misjudge the count and the box closes as you are still half through it'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; you misjudge the count and the box closes as you are still half through it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=58 beats='second person; you throw yourself at the trap and roll for the gap on instinct, no count kept; instinct lands you clear or lands you under the lid; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the lid finds your shoulder as you fall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the box does not open twice'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the box does not open twice'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; the prompter himself is below, and he closes cold hands on your collar the moment you land in his box; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=52 beats='second person; you come to the Gallery of Masks; a wall of mirrored theatre masks hangs down the passage, each a doubled face, one of them an opening'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='second person; the masks blink in their reflections, all but one; the mask that never blinks is a hole cut to look like the rest, and it is the way through; go to the still, unblinking mask, never a blinking one'>>

choices.label: Go to the mask that never blinks.
Push into a mask that blinks back at you.
Lift a mask off the wall to check behind it.
Wait for the masks to stop blinking.
Cover your eyes and feel for the gap.
Break the stillest mask to open it wider.
Gamble and count the blinks for the odd one out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you fix on the one dead face among the blinking masks and step into the dark hole behind it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you choose a living, blinking face and press it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the mask is solid mirror and it splits into your own reflected eyes'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the mask is solid mirror and it splits into your own reflected eyes'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you take a mask down to find the opening by hand'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the wall behind is unbroken glass and the mask's edge lays your palm open'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wall behind is unbroken glass and the mask's edge lays your palm open'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you stand and wait for the faces to go still'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the waiting kills; the masks blink on and on and the one you needed is lost among them while the gallery's keeper closes in'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting kills; the masks blink on and on and the one you needed is lost among them while the gallery's keeper closes in'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you shut your eyes and grope the wall of faces'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; blind, you press a blinking mask for the still one and the glass takes the guess'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; blind, you press a blinking mask for the still one and the glass takes the guess'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you strike the unblinking face to be sure of the way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; it was already an opening; the blow drives your arm through into edges you could not see'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it was already an opening; the blow drives your arm through into edges you could not see'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=62 beats='second person; you try to hold every mask at once and catch which never blinks; your eye may find the still face, or lose it in the flutter; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you reach for a face that blinked a beat ago'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the mirror mask closes on your reaching hand'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the mirror mask closes on your reaching hand'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a dresser in a half-mask steps from the wall, takes your arm, and fits you a room with no door of your own; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='second person; you come to the Hourglass Chamber; a square room of mirror floors down which fine sand pours from the seams, the tiles going under grain by grain'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='second person; the floor drains into itself and the tiles vanish under the rising sand as you watch; cross before the sand hides the true tiles, and never trust a tile the sand has already buried, for you cannot see the drop beneath it'>>

choices.label: Cross fast on the tiles the sand hasn't buried.
Wade across the buried tiles anyway.
Wait for the sand to finish draining.
Sweep the sand aside to read the tiles.
Leap tile to tile down the middle.
Gamble and run the buried floor flat out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you go quick over the bare tiles while you can still read them and reach the door before the sand wins'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you push into the drifted sand where the floor is hidden'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; under the sand a tile is gone and you find the drop with your whole weight'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; under the sand a tile is gone and you find the drop with your whole weight'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you hold at the door for the room to empty and clear'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the wait is the killing; the sand never stops pouring, it only rises, and it closes over the last true tile with you still deciding'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wait is the killing; the sand never stops pouring, it only rises, and it closes over the last true tile with you still deciding'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you crouch to brush a path clear with your hands'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the sand pours faster than you can sweep and it buries your knees, then the rest'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the sand pours faster than you can sweep and it buries your knees, then the rest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you jump the shortest line straight across'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; a tile you land on was already hollow under its dusting of sand and it drops out from you'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; a tile you land on was already hollow under its dusting of sand and it drops out from you'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='second person; you commit and sprint the sanded floor without reading it, betting most tiles still hold; speed may carry you over the gaps or into one; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the sand pours in after you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the chamber fills above where you fell'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the chamber fills above where you fell'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a sweeper with a lantern digs you out of the sand at the low end and the digging ends at a barred door; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='second person; you come to the Glass Bridge; a bridge of clear glass arches over a black drop, its span so clean it seems there is nothing there at all'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='second person; only the welded seam down the centre of the bridge bears weight; the clear span to either side of the seam is a single pane that will not hold you; walk the seam, never the span'>>

choices.label: Walk the welded seam down the centre.
Walk the open span, it looks solid enough.
Crawl across to spread your weight.
Wait for the glass to frost over for grip.
Slide across on your back, faster.
Gamble and walk it upright without minding the seam.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you set each foot on the frosted seam and cross the drop with the black air clear beneath you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you step off the seam onto the clear pane to widen your footing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the single sheet of glass gives all at once and the drop takes you without a sound'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the single sheet of glass gives all at once and the drop takes you without a sound'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you go down on hands and knees over the whole width'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; your knee comes down on the thin span beside the seam and it is gone before you feel it break'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your knee comes down on the thin span beside the seam and it is gone before you feel it break'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you hold at the edge for the cold to roughen the surface'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the delay is the fall; the span is warming, not frosting, from the lamps below, and the seam you need is fogging out of sight while you wait'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the fall; the span is warming, not frosting, from the lamps below, and the seam you need is fogging out of sight while you wait'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you lie flat and push off to skate the bridge'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; your shoulders spread over both spans at once and the panes let go together'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your shoulders spread over both spans at once and the panes let go together'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=58 beats='second person; you decide the whole bridge must be sound and stride it plainly, trusting the glass; the span may be tempered to hold or not; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; it stars under your second stride and drops'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the black takes you between the arch's ends'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the black takes you between the arch's ends'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a watchman waits at the far abutment, and he lets you finish the bridge only to take you in hand at the end of it; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='second person; you come to the Hall of Echoing Names; the mirrors down this hall murmur, and among the murmur you hear your own name spoken in your own voice'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='second person; the glass calls you to make you answer and turn, for the face that turns to the mirror is the face the glass keeps; hold your name unanswered and walk straight, never turn to a voice that says it'>>

choices.label: Keep straight and answer none of the voices.
Turn to the voice that has your name.
Answer, to prove it isn't you.
Stop and wait for the voices to tire.
Follow the one voice that sounds kind.
Gamble and follow the one voice that does not echo.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you fix your eyes on the far arch and let your name fall unanswered behind you; the hall lets you by'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you hear yourself called too clearly and you turn to it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; your reflection meets your eyes and the glass keeps the face that looked, and you fall still against the pane'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your reflection meets your eyes and the glass keeps the face that looked, and you fall still against the pane'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you call back at the mirror to break its hold'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; your voice joins the murmur and becomes another name the hall will use on the next to come; the glass takes you mid-word'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your voice joins the murmur and becomes another name the hall will use on the next to come; the glass takes you mid-word'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you halt and wait out the calling, hands over your ears'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the waiting is the death; the voices do not tire, they gather, and standing still is the same as turning, so the glass takes you where you stopped'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the death; the voices do not tire, they gather, and standing still is the same as turning, so the glass takes you where you stopped'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go toward the gentlest of the voices calling you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the kind voice leads you face-first to a waiting mirror and it was the kindest lie in the hall'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the kind voice leads you face-first to a waiting mirror and it was the kindest lie in the hall'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=62 beats='second person; you listen for the single voice that comes without an echo, betting a true sound has no double here; the flat voice may be a door or a deeper trap; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you turn to it and meet the glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the hall keeps the face that trusted it'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the hall keeps the face that trusted it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; the voice was a caller's, and the caller steps out to take the arm of the one who answered and lead you away; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='second person; you come to the Shattered Proscenium; a broken arch of mirror frames the way, half its panes already smashed to a floor of shards, half still whole'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='second person; here the safe ground is where the glass is already broken, for the shards cannot fall on you twice; the whole panes overhead are hung and waiting; cross under the broken frame, never under a pane still whole'>>

choices.label: Cross under the whole panes, the floor's clear there.
Sweep a path clear through the shards.
Wait for the loose panes to fall first.
Run through fast before anything can fall.
Gamble and go barefoot over the shards for quiet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you pick over the fallen shards, keeping under the empty frames, and reach the far side of the arch'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you take the clean footing beneath the unbroken mirrors'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; a whole pane lets go from the arch above and comes down on the clean floor, and you'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; a whole pane lets go from the arch above and comes down on the clean floor, and you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you kick and sweep the broken glass aside for smoother ground'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the noise of it shakes a hung pane loose overhead and it falls before you can look up'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the noise of it shakes a hung pane loose overhead and it falls before you can look up'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you hold back for the arch to finish shedding its glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the delay is the death; the panes are pinned, not loose, and they fall only when a warden pulls the pin, timed for whoever waits beneath'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death; the panes are pinned, not loose, and they fall only when a warden pulls the pin, timed for whoever waits beneath'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you sprint the arch to beat the drop'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; your speed carries you under a whole pane at the worst instant and it meets you there'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your speed carries you under a whole pane at the worst instant and it meets you there'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='second person; you strip your shoes to cross the shards in silence, betting quiet keeps the panes hung; the silence may hold them or your cut feet may fail you; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you cannot keep your feet under you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go down under the whole panes still hanging'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; you go down under the whole panes still hanging'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a property-master picks his way to you across the glass, wraps your bleeding feet, and locks you somewhere to heal for his own reasons; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=52 beats='second person; you come to the Weeping Wall; a wall of mirror sweats a sheet of water down the whole passage, the way a single dry channel through the wet'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='second person; where the glass runs wet it is charged and the water carries the shock straight to the bone; only the one dry vein down the wall is safe to touch and follow; keep to the dry channel, never lay a hand on the wet glass'>>

choices.label: Follow the one dry vein down the wall.
Push through the wet glass, it's only water.
Wipe the wall dry ahead of you.
Wait for the wall to stop weeping.
Cross to a dry patch on the far side.
Gamble and go through the thinnest run of water.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you trace the dry channel with a careful hand and follow it the length of the weeping wall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you set your palm flat against the running sheet'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the charge in the water takes your arm and does not let the muscle open your hand again'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the charge in the water takes your arm and does not let the muscle open your hand again'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you drag your sleeve down the wet to make more dry path'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the soaked cloth carries the shock up your arm the instant it touches the sheet'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the soaked cloth carries the shock up your arm the instant it touches the sheet'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you hold at the dry vein for the water to run itself out'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the waiting kills; the wall weeps from a cistern that never empties, and the dry vein you trust is narrowing to nothing as you wait'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting kills; the wall weeps from a cistern that never empties, and the dry vein you trust is narrowing to nothing as you wait'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you reach across the wet sheet for drier glass beyond'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; your reaching arm bridges the charged water and it closes the circuit through you'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your reaching arm bridges the charged water and it closes the circuit through you'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=58 beats='second person; you pick the place the sheet runs thinnest and push through it fast, betting a thin film cannot hold enough charge; thin may be safe or only less slow; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; it locks your legs mid-stride against the glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go down against the weeping wall'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; you go down against the weeping wall'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a lampman throws a dry hooked pole and drags you off the charged wall, then keeps the hook on you all the way to a cell; the way up is a locked one now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='second person; you come to the Turning Room; a drum of mirror turns slowly across the passage, its one doorway swinging past the opening once each revolution'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='second person; the drum's door lines up with the way out only for a breath on each turn; step through on the half-turn when the openings meet, and never against the closed wall of the drum, which will grind you into the frame'>>

choices.label: Step through when the doorway lines up.
Step in against the closed wall to wait inside.
Force the drum to stop turning.
Wait for the drum to slow down.
Dive through as the door is already leaving.
Gamble and match the drum's spin from inside its rim.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you watch the drum come round, take the door as it meets the frame, and ride the half-turn out the other side'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you push into the drum before its door has come round'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the turning wall carries you into the frame and there is no give in either'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the turning wall carries you into the frame and there is no give in either'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you jam your shoulder to hold the drum still for a clean step'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the weight of it does not stop; it pins your arm to the frame and keeps turning'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the weight of it does not stop; it pins your arm to the frame and keeps turning'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you hold outside for the turning to ease before you try it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the delay is the death; the drum does not slow, it quickens, and the window of the door shrinks each turn until there is none'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death; the drum does not slow, it quickens, and the window of the door shrinks each turn until there is none'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you throw yourself at the opening a beat after it lines up'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the door swings past and the closing wall catches your trailing leg against the frame'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the door swings past and the closing wall catches your trailing leg against the frame'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=62 beats='second person; you slip onto the turning rim and try to walk with the spin to the door, betting you can match its pace; matching carries you round to the gap or slings you off; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the rim throws you into the closing wall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the frame and the wall meet through you'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the frame and the wall meet through you'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a machinist rides the drum round, catches your wrist on the turn, and rides you back to a room he keeps locked; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='second person; you come to the Last Reflection; a single mirror stands at a low doorway, and in it your own reflection stands squarely between you and the way through'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='second person; your reflection here moves only while the light burns, and mirrors you move for move so long as it can see you; it cannot follow in the dark; the lamp above will gutter, and in that black breath you must move, for while the light holds, any step you take it takes to block you'>>

choices.label: Wait for the lamp to gutter, then move in the dark.
Step for the door while the lamp still burns.
Reach through the mirror to shove it aside.
Wait for the reflection to look away first.
Feint one way and go the other.
Gamble and rush the mirror before you lose your nerve.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the flame ducks and the mirror goes blind for one breath; you move in that black and are past the reflection before the light returns'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you move for the doorway in the full light'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the reflection steps with you to block the way and you walk your own face into the unyielding glass'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the reflection steps with you to block the way and you walk your own face into the unyielding glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you put a hand to the glass to push your double away'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; your reflection's hand meets yours cold and closed and will not let the caught hand back'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your reflection's hand meets yours cold and closed and will not let the caught hand back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you hold and wait for your double to break and turn'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; the waiting is the death; it will never look away, for it only ever does what you do, and while you wait the lamp steadies and the keepers come'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the death; it will never look away, for it only ever does what you do, and while you wait the lamp steadies and the keepers come'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you throw a false step to draw the reflection wide'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; it feints exactly with you, for it is you, and closes the true side as you commit to it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it feints exactly with you, for it is you, and closes the true side as you commit to it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='second person; you charge the glass and your double at once, betting speed beats a copy that must wait to see you move; you may burst past before it reads you or drive full into it; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; it meets your rush square in the glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the last mirror keeps the face that ran at it'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the last mirror keeps the face that ran at it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; as the lamp steadies a keeper's arms come round you from the true dark, not the glass, and walk you back the way you fought in; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='second person; you come to the Hall of the Thousand Yous; the last hall opens into a sphere of mirror where a thousand of you stand in every direction, and only one direction is a way and not a wall'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='second person; the true exit is the one bearing where your reflections thin to nothing, for a door reflects no one; every crowded direction is a mirror packed with your doubles; walk toward the gap where the thousand yous fall away, never toward the thickest crowd of them'>>

choices.label: Walk toward the gap where your reflections thin.
Walk toward the thickest crowd of yourself.
Wait for the reflections to settle and agree.
Break the nearest you to open a way.
Follow the you that beckons you on.
Gamble and shut your eyes and walk a straight line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; you find the one bearing empty of yourself and walk into it; the thousand doubles fall away behind you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go toward where the most of you stand, taking the crowd for company'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; the crowd is the deepest mirror in the hall and you walk your thousand faces flat into it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the crowd is the deepest mirror in the hall and you walk your thousand faces flat into it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=51 beats='second person; you stand still to let the thousand doubles quiet and point one way'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the waiting is the last trap of the maze; the doubles only multiply the longer you hold, until every bearing is a wall of you and there is no gap left to find'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the last trap of the maze; the doubles only multiply the longer you hold, until every bearing is a wall of you and there is no gap left to find'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; you strike the reflection standing closest to make a door of it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=54 beats='second person; it was solid mirror and it comes apart into a thousand of your own eyes at once'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it was solid mirror and it comes apart into a thousand of your own eyes at once'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you go after the single reflection that seems to wave you forward'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=46 beats='second person; it leads you into the crowd, not the gap, for a reflection can only lead you back into the glass'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=52 beats='second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it leads you into the crowd, not the gap, for a reflection can only lead you back into the glass'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=58 beats='second person; you close your eyes on the thousand of you and walk one straight line by feel, betting the gap lies ahead; blind, you may find the open bearing or a wall of yourself; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you open your eyes against a wall of your own faces'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the hall keeps the one who could not walk it blind'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='second person; the gamble takes you; the hall keeps the one who could not walk it blind'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; you are not killed but kept; a stagehand steps out of the one true gap, turns you by the shoulder, and walks you off before you reach it yourself; the way up is a locked one now'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='second person; the spine ends at a plain door in a plain wall of glass, and beyond it the empty stage of the opera house stands grey with dawn; the prompter's records are in your coat'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=74 beats='second person; three ways lead up and out and each is real: the dark mirror that shows nothing is the clean way, the cracked pane is quicker but it will cut, and the flooded pit door lets you out unseen; the only deaths here are the mirror you smash to be sure, and the wait for the house lights to prove a way that needs no proving'>>

choices.label: Step into the dark mirror that holds no reflection.
Go through the cracked pane, quick and sharp.
Slip out the flooded pit door, unseen.
Smash the last mirror to be certain of it.
Wait for the house lights to prove the way.
Trust your own reflection to lead you up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=62 beats='second person; the dark mirror is an open door; you climb into the empty house as the dawn comes grey through the high windows, the records safe, your name your own again; you came up clean'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=60 beats='second person; the cracked pane opens the way but its edge lays your arm as you pass; you come up onto the stage bleeding and shaking, but you come up, and the records come up with you'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=60 beats='second person; the pit door lets you out below the stalls where no one watches; you leave the labyrinth the way water leaves, unseen and unremarked, and no one ever knows you went down'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you strike the dark last mirror to prove it hollow'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the mirror was solid after all and it bursts inward across the threshold'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; the glass keeps you one step short of the dawn; you were so near the top that no one below hears it happen'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; you hold at the threshold and wait for the house lights to come up and show the safe door plain'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; the delay is the last death of the labyrinth; the lights that come up are the keepers' lanterns, closing on the one who waited at the very door'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; they take you on the last step with the dawn in sight; the way up closes over the records and over you'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=60 beats='second person; you turn to your own reflection at the threshold to let it lead you up, the way it has mirrored you the whole climb; a reflection can only show the way back, or by some grace the way you already chose'>>

choices.label: Follow it toward the dark door you had already found.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=50 beats='second person; the reflection points you back down the spine you climbed'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=48 beats='second person; you follow your own face away from the dawn and the labyrinth folds its mirrors shut behind you'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=54 beats='second person; your reflection led you where reflections go, deeper in; the glass keeps the one who trusted it at the last'>>
